news.title: Seaport, Hemab chart courses for $180M IPOs to fund depression, clotting candidates
news.snippet: Both Seaport and Hemab are hoping to bring in around $180 million each from their public listings this week, in the latest sign that biotech IPOs are regaining their momentum.

news.title: Compass Therapeutics’ stock heads south after cancer bispecific misses on overall survival
news.snippet: Compass Therapeutics shed half its stock price this morning as investors digested its bispecific antibody’s failure to hit an overall survival (OS) endpoint in a phase 2/3 study.

news.title: Astellas thins early pipeline, swaps out struggling rare disease gene therapy
news.snippet: Astellas Pharma has done some spring cleaning of its pipeline, dropping two phase 1 candidates and slamming the brakes on a troubled gene therapy.

news.title: Ligand snaps up fellow biotech royalty aggregator Xoma for $739M
news.snippet: After Xoma Royalty went on a dealmaking spree last year, the biotech royalty aggregator is now itself being bought out by its peer Ligand Pharmaceuticals.

news.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific sells microbiology business for $1B to European private equity firm
news.snippet: Thermo Fisher Scientific is shedding its microbiology business to private equity firm Astorg nearly a year after rumors of a potential sale first surfaced.

news.title: Blood test powered by AI shows early promise in monitoring rare childhood cancer
news.snippet: A new liquid biopsy test using artificial intelligence models could help spot a rare type of bone and soft tissue cancer that predominantly affects children and adolescents.

news.title: Oruka’s psoriasis data hailed as ‘outright win over Skyrizi,’ spurring big blockbuster forecasts
news.snippet: Oruka Therapeutics’ long-acting plaque psoriasis candidate cleared the skin of 63.5% of patients in a phase 2a trial, leading Jefferies analysts to predict the asset could beat out AbbVie’s Skyrizi an

news.title: Intellia races in vivo CRISPR therapy to FDA after phase 3 data paint ‘compelling’ picture
news.snippet: A phase 3 trial of Intellia Therapeutics’ in vivo gene editing therapy lonvoguran ziclumeran has hit its primary endpoint, leading the biotech to start a rolling submission for FDA approval.

news.title: Endoscopic procedure can help slow weight rebound from stopping GLP-1 treatment: study
news.snippet: A simple outpatient procedure currently used for type 2 diabetes patients in Europe can help those on Eli Lilly’s obesity drug tirzepatide keep most of their weight off when stopping the med.

news.title: Lilly maintains M&A hot streak with $2.3B deal for next-gen JAK inhibitor biotech Ajax
news.snippet: Eli Lilly’s run of near-weekly acquisitions still shows no sign of letting up, with the Big Pharma now buying Ajax Therapeutics for its clinical-stage myelofibrosis therapy.

news.title: Tandem Diabetes issues software device correction for insulin pump malfunction
news.snippet: Tandem Diabetes Care issued an urgent medical device correction to upgrade the software of its Tandem Mobi insulin pumps that can fail to deliver critical medicine to patients.

news.title: British biotech VC funding shows ‘signs of recovery,’ but IPO rebound yet to materialize
news.snippet: The 552 million pounds ($747 million) raised by British biotechs in the first quarter of the year has been hailed as a “sign of recovery,” although an anticipated resurgence of IPOs across the nation

news.title: Thermo Fisher sees higher Q1 earnings amid strong biopharma demand
news.snippet: Thermo Fisher Scientific reported “a strong start to the year,” buoyed by strong demand from its pharma and biotech customers, investment in new technologies and the closing of its $9 billion acquisit

news.title: Compass, Usona and Transcend score FDA national priority vouchers amid Trump administration’s psychedelic push
news.snippet: The FDA is awarding national priority vouchers to Compass Pathways, Usona Institute and Transcend Therapeutics for their psychedelic treatments.

news.title: WCG acquires The Contract Network in bid to streamline clinical trial execution
news.snippet: Clinical trials solutions provider WCG is acquiring tech company The Contract Network to improve alignment and decision-making across clinical trial initiation.

news.title: Mundipharma, CorMedix eye antifungal expansion after Rezzayo trial win
news.snippet: Mundipharma and CorMedix have announced a win for their antifungal drug Rezzayo at preventing invasive fungal diseases in patients receiving allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplants.

news.title: Regulatory tracker: AZ wins self-administration nod for lupus med Saphnelo at FDA
news.snippet: In this tracker, Fierce Pharma is recording the regulatory progress of in-market products, including expansions into key geographies and new indications. Some of these updates may not meet the bar for

news.title: Astellas counts on new medicines to offset projected Xtandi decline in fiscal 2026
news.snippet: Compared with a 5.3% increase in Xtandi sales to $6 billion in fiscal year 2025, Astellas expects the star prostate cancer drug’s revenue to drop by 5.3% during fiscal 2026.

news.title: Pfizer settles with 2 generic Vyndamax makers in latest twist to ATTR market: analysts
news.snippet: Eleventh-hour settlements with two of the three generic drugmakers involved could bode well for both Pfizer and its ATTR competitor BridgeBio, analysts say.

news.title: Sun Pharma strikes biopharma's largest deal of '26 with $11.75B buyout of Organon
news.snippet: Already the largest biopharma company in India, generics powerhouse Sun Pharma has doubled in size with its acquisition of women’s health leader Organon. With its $11.75 billion buyout, Sun has picked

news.title: Haleon nabs Google exec Richard Manso as US chief marketing officer
news.snippet: Haleon, a healthcare consumer and OTC brand company, has hired Richard Manso, a Google veteran, as its new U.S. chief marketing officer.

news.title: Ligand snaps up fellow biotech royalty aggregator Xoma for $739M
news.snippet: After Xoma Royalty went on a dealmaking spree last year, the biotech royalty aggregator is now itself being bought out by its peer Ligand Pharmaceuticals.

news.title: FDA lambasts Incyte over ‘misleading’ Niktimvo claims
news.snippet: The FDA has taken umbrage with certain Incyte promotional claims related to its chronic graft-versus-host disease treatment Niktimvo.

news.title: Accelerating clinical trials with precision logistics
news.snippet: Learn how Marken’s Laboratory Advantage improves speed, visibility and compliance to keep clinical trials on track.

news.title: Lessons from the eye: How cell therapy is shaping the future of regenerative medicine
news.snippet: Astellas R&D leaders, Jotaro Suzuki, Marci English, and Erin Kimbrel, reflect on how cell therapy could change the future of degenerative diseases.

news.title: The Oral GLP-1 Tracker: Lilly's launch of Foundayo lags, boosting Novo's shares
news.snippet: Fierce Pharma is launching the weekly Oral GLP-1 Tracker, leveraging analysts’ notes and IQVIA data to monitor prescription trends and shifting market shares as Novo Nordisk's Wegovy pill and Eli Lill

news.title: UPDATED: Roche Q1 earnings suffer from currency headwinds with hits and misses across the board
news.snippet: The surging Swiss franc has hindered Roche, as its first-quarter sales fell slightly short of Wall Street expectations with a “mix of beats and misses” across key products.

news.title: FDA snubs AbbVie's prospective Botox heir amid series of manufacturing-related CRLs
news.snippet: The FDA rejected two new products from AbbVie and Grace Therapeutics, citing manufacturing-related concerns.

news.title: Sanofi gains long-awaited win for tolebrutinib as EU regulator endorses MS drug for approval
news.snippet: After a series of setbacks for Sanofi’s tolebrutinib, the French company has scored a victory for the multiple sclerosis candidate.

news.title: Daiichi pushes back annual report, citing reviews amid ‘rapidly changing business conditions’
news.snippet: Daiichi Sankyo has postponed its annual report by two weeks, citing additional time needed to review “the supply plans for its oncology products portfolio and development pipeline.”

news.title: New U.S. recommendation on hepatitis B vaccine will have dire consequences, studies project
news.snippet: Policy that recommends offering hep B vaccine at birth only to babies perceived to be at risk will lead to increased numbers of infected infants, new studies project.

news.title: Supreme Court grapples with multibillion-dollar wave of lawsuits over Roundup cancer claims
news.snippet: The Supreme Court seemed divided Monday over whether to block thousands of lawsuits alleging the maker of the weedkiller Roundup failed to warn people it could cause cancer.

news.title: STAT+: Erasca touts strong, though preliminary, results in trial of pancreatic and lung cancer therapy
news.snippet: The drugmaker Erasca said results on its experimental pill in a trial of pancreatic cancer and non-small cell lung cancer exceeded its expectations.

news.title: Trump administration warns against using federal dollars on fentanyl test strips
news.snippet: The Trump administration underlines a “clear shift away from harm reduction and practices” that it says facilitates illegal drug use.

news.title: STAT+: Astellas retries XLMTM gene therapy after deaths
news.snippet: Veradermics' hair loss pill late-stage trial success, FDA fast-tracks reviews for psychedelics, and more biotech news

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about a Lilly deal, an Intellia CRISPR rare-disease treatment, and more
news.snippet: Intellia disclosed that a single dose of its gene editing treatment dramatically reduced swelling attacks in patients with hereditary angioedema

news.title: STAT+: Intellia says CRISPR-based treatment for rare disease reduced swelling attacks in pivotal trial
news.snippet: With good results from Intellia, the CRISPR field faces the question: How attractive will the one-and-done approach be to patients and doctors?

news.title: STAT+: Oruka’s long-acting psoriasis therapy posts strong results in mid-stage study
news.snippet: A long-acting injectable treatment for plaque psoriasis helped 63% of patients achieve complete skin clearance in a clinical trial, its maker, Oruka Therapeutics, reported.

news.title: STAT+: Veradermics’ hair loss drug succeeds in late-stage trial
news.snippet: The company is one of the most advanced players in the hair loss field, which has seen a surge of investor enthusiasm.

news.title: STAT+: Zap in a cap: How one neurotech startup is using a hat to treat depression
news.snippet: FDA approved a request from Motif Neurotech, to start an initial feasibility trial to test a brain implant to treat depression.

news.title: UK healthy life expectancy falls by two years in past decade
news.snippet: Poor housing, obesity and the effects of deprivation have been suggested as underlying cause.

news.title: Girl, 6, has sight restored through gene therapy
news.snippet: Saffie's mum says Luxturna therapy at Great Ormond Street has been like "someone waved a magic wand".

news.title: Trump administration reclassifies cannabis as less dangerous
news.snippet: Medical marijuana was moved into a lower category of drugs in order to increase research and access.

news.title: High Street mini-marts selling cocaine, cannabis and prescription drugs, BBC secret filming reveals
news.snippet: Across the UK, shopfronts are being exploited by criminal gangs pushing illegal drugs, experts say.

news.title: I'm on six different NHS waiting lists - it's taking over my life
news.snippet: Amy-Jane Davies is one of 687,958 waiting for any type of NHS treatment in Wales.
